name: beach by ocean
description: I'm in a beach by ocean
hints: A beach on the far side of the island with a cave visible in the cliff.
GO CAVE to enter the cave in the cliff. This connects to the ancient cave system.
The cave leads to the ancient cave with primitive drawings and a passage to the alien tunnels.
GO CAVE=ancient cave (17). This beach is accessed from the ancient cave heading S.
notes: Beach by ocean with cave in cliff. GO CAVE=ancient cave (17). Accessed via S from ancient cave.
